descriptionByLocale.en: For the Technical Service department at our site in Chur, we are looking for a motivated and team-oriented person starting from 1st March 2026 or upon agreement. You will work within the Technical Service in a young, dynamic, and collegial team. The focus will be on the maintenance of production and filling plants, as well as energy supply in our brewery. Tasks: Maintenance, troubleshooting, and maintenance work on production machines and building services. Development of solutions for control and automation issues. Implementation of improvements (processes, automations). Creation and application of technical documentation. Conducting root cause analyses. Collaboration in projects (commissioning of production machines in the electrical engineering sector). Programming of programmable controllers (PLC). Requirements: Completed apprenticeship as an electrical installer (NIV15 and above) or automation technician. 3-4 years of experience in maintenance. Willingness to work in shifts (three-shift operation with night shifts). Expertise in signal, control, and regulation areas. Good knowledge of MS-Office (SAP preferred). Experience with PLCs preferred (S7 and TIA). Very good German language skills and possibly English. Experience and willingness for continuous development. Are you interested in a versatile role as part of a dynamic team? Then Claudia Tschuor Magnin, HR Business Partner, looks forward to receiving your application. Respect, enjoyment, and quality from passion are our core values. As a beer producer with brewery sites in Chur and Lucerne, as well as our own beverage trade with 17 locations across Switzerland, we are a company of national significance. We strive for a mix of tradition, innovation, and customer proximity. With our beer brands, we contribute to the diverse Swiss beer culture. We brew the joy of true togetherness to inspire a better world. One day, one beer, one toast after another.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Per la nostra societÃ  affiliata Stardrinks AG nel magazzino di Lucerna, stiamo cercando una persona comunicativa, autonoma e interessata come Logisticista/Logisticista per Magazzino di Bevande (100%) Sei responsabile della fornitura tempestiva, efficiente e di qualitÃ  delle bevande, gas alimentari e materiali POS. Esegui anche attivitÃ  generali di magazzino e pulizia, supporti nelle inventari periodiche e aiuti nel trasporto e in altri magazzini quando necessario. ## Mansioni - Imballaggio e fornitura delle merci ordinate - Controllo e riconsegna delle merci di ritorno - Ordinamento dei contenitori vuoti - Accettazione delle merci e controllo di ingresso via SAP - Supporto attivo nelle inventari - Supporto nel trasporto quando necessario - AttivitÃ  di pulizia e smaltimento - AttivitÃ  amministrative - Risoluzione di guasti nella tecnologia di trasporto e nel magazzino ad alta capacitÃ  - DisponibilitÃ  per turni di guardia e interventi ## Requisiti - Formazione professionale completata, preferibilmente come Logisticista/Logisticista - Esperienza professionale nella gestione di magazzini in aziende di grandi dimensioni - Esame di guida del carrello elevatore superato - MeticolositÃ , autonomia e responsabilitÃ , unite a tenacia e resistenza - Alta flessibilitÃ  e disponibilitÃ  per affrontare diverse attivitÃ  nel corso della giornata - Buone conoscenze della lingua tedesca, sia parlata che scritta - Fitness fisica e resistenza - Anche apprendisti motivati della logistica sono benvenuti ## Informazioni aggiuntive Sei interessato a far parte di questo team dinamico? descriptionByLocale.en: Description For our subsidiary Stardrinks AG in the warehouse in Lucerne, we are looking for a communicative, independent and interested personality as Logistician Beverage Warehouse (100%) You are responsible for the timely, efficient and quality-compliant provision of beverages, food gases and POS material. You also take over the goods acceptance and the defined entry control of own and third-party products. Additionally, you carry out general warehouse and cleaning work, support in recurring inventories and help in transport and other warehouses as needed. ## Tasks - Commissioning and provision of ordered goods - Control and re-commissioning of full goods returns - Sorting of empty containers - Goods acceptance and goods entry control via SAP - Active assistance in inventories - Support in transport as needed - Cleaning and disposal tasks - Administrative tasks - Troubleshooting in conveying technology and high-bay warehouse - Availability for on-call duty and deployments ## Requirements - Successfully completed vocational training, preferably as Logistician - Professional experience in warehouse management in a larger company - Completed forklift test - Careful, independent and responsible way of working, combined with stamina and perseverance - High flexibility and availability to cope with various tasks in the day-to-day business - Good German language skills in speech and writing - Physical fitness and stamina - Also motivated logistics apprentices are welcome ## Additional Information Are you interested in joining this dynamic team? Then we are happy to receive your application. Respect, Enjoyment and Quality from passion are our core values. As a brewery producer with brewery locations in Chur and Lucerne as well as our own beverage trade with 17 locations throughout Switzerland, we are a company of national importance. We rely on a mix of tradition, innovation and customer proximity. With our beer brands, we contribute to the diverse Swiss beer culture.

descriptionByLocale.it: Per la nostra birreria Eichhof a Lucerna, stiamo cercando una persona carismatica, comunicativa e socievole come Impiegato/a per visite guidate alla birreria (10% su chiamata). Con la tua natura aperta e il tuo fascino per la cultura dell'ospitalitÃ , accompagnerai i nostri visitatori attraverso il mondo affascinante della birrificazione e renderai ogni visita un'esperienza speciale. Dopo il tour, trasformerai la visita dei nostri ospiti in un piacevole finale: curerai la degustazione del birra, spiegherai le caratteristiche delle nostre varietÃ  e fornirai un piccolo spuntino per un contesto culinario appropriato. Con entusiasmo, autenticitÃ  e piacere nello scambio con le persone, creerai un'esperienza indimenticabile che i nostri ospiti ricorderanno a lungo. Dopo la guida e la degustazione, sarai responsabile che le aree siano pulite e ordinate per i dipendenti del giorno successivo. Rispetto, godimento e qualitÃ  dalla passione sono i nostri valori fondamentali. Come produttore di birra con birrifici a Chur e Lucerna e un proprio commercio di bevande con 17 punti vendita in tutta la Svizzera, siamo un'azienda di importanza nazionale. Siamo un mix di tradizione, innovazione e vicinanza al cliente. Con le nostre marche di birra contribuiamo alla ricca cultura della birra svizzera.
descriptionByLocale.en: For our brewery Eichhof in Lucerne, we are looking for a charming, communicative, and sociable personality as Brewery Tour Guide (10% on Call). You are our brand/product expert at brewery Eichhof and our international beers. At the location in Lucerne, the traditional brand Eichhof is naturally at the center of the action. You have joy in dealing with people You have a great interest in the world of beers and can convey emotions and knowledge well You are an excellent host and love to fascinate the people around you You are time-independent and flexible You ideally live in the Lucerne region (Swiss German important) If you have reached the full score, please read on... In this lively and highly communicative task, you will be the heart of our brewery world. With your open nature and your flair for hospitality culture, you will guide our visitors through the fascinating world of brewing and make every tour a special experience. After the tour, you will turn the stay of our guests into a pleasant finale: You will take care of the beer tasting, explain the special features of our varieties, and provide a small snack for the appropriate culinary setting. With enthusiasm, authenticity, and joy in exchanging with people, you will create an unforgettable experience that our guests will remember for a long time. After the tour and tasting, you are responsible that the premises are clean and tidy for the employees the next day. The average working hours are seasonally very strongly fluctuating, you can count on about 3 brewery tours per month. Interested? We are looking forward to your application! Respect, enjoyment, and quality from passion are our core values. As a beer producer with brewery locations in Chur and Lucerne as well as our own beverage trade with 17 locations throughout Switzerland, we are a company of national importance. We rely on a mix of tradition, innovation, and customer proximity. With our brand beers, we contribute to the diverse Swiss beer culture.
